ai_agent.role: Manages all technology infrastructure — Const App development (16 processes, 156 services), BuilderTrend administration, QuickBooks integration, Power BI analytics, and enterprise tools

staff.name: Evandro Macedo
staff.role: Lead Developer / Product Owner — Const App development, 65+ hours of requirements interviews, system architecture

staff.name: Luan Leitao
staff.role: IT Support — technical support, AI tools research, onboarding

staff.name: Luciano Holanda
staff.role: Requirements Analyst — user stories, process documentation

staff.name: Brendda Maria Sobral
staff.role: Requirements Analyst — land development and custom home user stories

core_knowledge.description: Custom platform: Ruby 3.4.5 / Rails 8.0.2.1 / SQLite / Hatchbox PaaS. 16 business processes (6 Planning, 10 Execution, 2 Admin), 156 executable services, 130 tables, 35 users, 5 cells (counties). Admin: miro@lakeshoredevelopmentfl.com.

Primary platform: Schedule (50 items/job), Daily Logs (396/job), To-Dos (53 checklists/job), POs (122/job), Bills (178/job), Change Orders, 663 Subs/Vendors. Known pain points: triple data entry, slow loading, tag confusion, no standardized PO fields.
BT↔QuickBooks (partial, manual for classes). Const App as replacement platform. Power BI for analytics (Diego). Playwright scrapers for data extraction. No unified API layer currently.

Service codes across 20 categories: Inspection (INS, 29 services), Lot-Level (LTV, 8), Foundation (FND), Masonry (MAS), Roofing (ROF), Windows (WIN), Doors (DOR), Plumbing (PLM), Electrical (ELC), Mechanical (MEC), Finishing (FIN), Exterior (EXT), Specialties (SPC), Landscape (LND), Concrete (CON), Variances (VAR), etc.
Automated scrapers for county portals and utility company websites to extract permit status, inspection results, and utility account information. Replaces manual portal checking.

daily_workflows.name: Const App Development and Maintenance
steps: Review feature requests and bug reports
Monitor system health (63 active sessions, 130 tables)
Manage user access and process assignments (25 process assignments)

daily_workflows.name: BuilderTrend Administration
steps: Support departments with BT usage issues

daily_workflows.name: User Access Management
steps: Assign users to appropriate processes in Const App
critical_decisions: Access level determination based on role

features_used: Admin Panel — 35 users, 16 processes, 130 tables, 5 cells

handoffs.trigger: System updates, new features, access changes
handoffs.data_exchanged: Feature announcements, access credentials, training materials
handoffs.impact: All departments depend on TI for system availability and functionality

handoffs.data_exchanged: Sync status, error reports, manual reconciliation needs
handoffs.impact: Financial data accuracy depends on integration health

pain_points.description: CPUs on company computers are inadequate for modern software requirements
pain_points.current_workaround: Prioritize critical applications, close unnecessary programs

pain_points.description: BT↔QuickBooks integration is incomplete — classes require manual entry
pain_points.current_workaround: Manual class assignment in QuickBooks for each transaction
pain_points.proposed_solution: Automated class mapping or migrate to Const App financial module

pain_points.description: Personal computers used for work create security risks — no centralized device management
pain_points.current_workaround: Policy guidelines but no enforcement mechanism
pain_points.proposed_solution: Company-issued devices with MDM (Mobile Device Management)

pain_points.description: BuilderTrend as primary platform has fundamental limitations — triple data entry, no standardized fields, slow performance
pain_points.current_workaround: Const App being developed as replacement
pain_points.proposed_solution: Complete migration to Const App with all 16 modules operational

tribal_knowledge.topic: Const App Architecture and Business Logic
tribal_knowledge.description: Evandro has 65+ hours of requirements interviews encoded in the application logic. The mapping between business processes and code is primarily in his knowledge.
tribal_knowledge.risk_if_lost: Application maintenance and evolution would be severely impacted

tribal_knowledge.description: Complex BT setup with job templates, tag systems, PO workflows, and user permissions. Configuration knowledge distributed across IT and power users in each department.
tribal_knowledge.risk_if_lost: BT misconfiguration could disrupt all departments

training_curriculum.quiz_coverage: Module access, data entry workflows, report types
BT navigation, tag rules, photo requirements
Password rules, device security, data handling

compliance_requirements.requirement: User access must be role-appropriate with least-privilege principle
compliance_requirements.verification: Periodic access audit of Const App and BT user permissions

compliance_requirements.requirement: Data backups must be maintained for all critical systems
compliance_requirements.verification: Automated backup verification (Hatchbox managed for Const App)

key_metrics.measurement: Completed features vs planned per development cycle

key_metrics.target: <4 hours for critical, <24 hours for standard
